summary: Frontend testing of 6 new Tactical Mode features for military/security personnel. All features verified working: Dead Man's Switch, Tactical Mesh Network, QR Emergency Beacon, Offline Threat Map, One-Chance Mode, and Panic Data Wipe. All features show OFFLINE badge indicating offline capability.
passed_tests: Tactical Mode page accessible via /tactical route
Navigation menu shows 'Tactical Mode' option with Radio icon (highlighted green when active)
Dead Man's Switch component expands and shows toggle and settings
Dead Man's Switch can be enabled (toggle works) - shows timer 30:00, missed counter 0/3, CHECK IN button
Tactical Mesh Network shows Create Network and Join Network buttons
Create Network button generates a network ID (TG-XXXXXX format)
Tactical Mesh shows message input, Share Location, SOS buttons when connected
QR Emergency Beacon component shows location and SOS QR / Location QR buttons
QR Emergency Beacon shows Current Location display with Share Location button
Offline Threat Map shows Download Threat Data button
Offline Threat Map shows Report Threat options (IED, Ambush, Hostile)
One-Chance Mode component is accessible from Tactical Mode page with toggle
Panic Data Wipe component is visible with warning styling (red text)
All 6 feature cards show 'OFFLINE' badge indicating offline capability
Info banner shows 'For High-Risk Operations' with badges: No Internet Required, End-to-End Encrypted, Mesh Networking
Security Notice warning displayed at bottom of page
Quick stats show: 6 Offline Features, 100% No Internet, E2E Encrypted
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 Tactical Mode features verified working: 1) Dead Man's Switch - auto check-in system with configurable intervals (5-60 min), missed check-in counter, auto-SOS trigger, 2) Tactical Mesh Network - WiFi hotspot-based squad communication with TG-XXXXXX network IDs, message input, location sharing, SOS broadcast, 3) QR Emergency Beacon - generates QR codes for SOS and location sharing without internet, 4) Offline Threat Map - download threat intel for Nigerian conflict zones (Northeast/Northwest), report threats (IED, Ambush, Hostile), 5) One-Chance Mode - shake-to-trigger silent SOS for vehicle robbery with fake shutdown screen, 6) Panic Data Wipe - emergency data destruction with triple-tap trigger. All features work 100% offline using localStorage, IndexedDB, and local WiFi hotspots.

tactical_mode_page.header: Tactical Mode - Advanced offline safety features
tactical_mode_page.navigation: Radio icon in sidebar, highlighted when active

dead_man_switch.check_in_button: Working - large green CHECK IN button
dead_man_switch.settings: Working - configurable intervals and alert options

tactical_mesh_network.join_network: Working - dialog with network ID input
tactical_mesh_network.message_input: Working - text input with send button
tactical_mesh_network.share_location: Working - button to share GPS coordinates
tactical_mesh_network.sos_button: Working - red SOS button for mesh broadcast

qr_emergency_beacon.sos_qr_button: Working - red button to generate SOS QR
qr_emergency_beacon.location_qr_button: Working - green button to generate location QR
qr_emergency_beacon.share_location: Working - native share or copy link

offline_threat_map.stats_display: Working - shows total reports, high risk, nearby

panic_data_wipe.confirmation_dialog: Working - requires typing WIPE to confirm
